'''Gendius V''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]] that occupied the fifth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position<ref name="Wizards" /> within the [[Gendius system/Legends|Gendius system]], a part of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]]<ref name="TEA" /> [[Gendius sector/Legends|Gendius sector]].<ref name="EAOC" />

{{RPGseed}}
At some point, the inhabitants of Gendius V were threatened by a plague. A group of individuals visiting the world saved the local people from the disease, and several young adventurers from Gendius V joined the group, becoming the followers of one of their saviors.<ref name="Wizards" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
Gendius V was first mentioned in "Do You Know Who I Am?," an article written by [[Owen K.C. Stephens]] and published on [[March 28]], [[2002]] as part of the ''[[Tips and Tactics]]'' column on the [[Wizards of the Coast]] [[Wizards.com|official website]]. The world is mentioned in an adventure suggestion for use with the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', which this article plays out as described.<ref name="Wizards" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Gendius [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Gendius V, in grid square J-17.<ref name="TEA" />
